description: Every applicant must submit the signed Affidavit & Disclosure Form.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Signed and dated Affidavit and Disclosure Form

description: Every applicant must submit the signed Application Tips form.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Signed and dated Application Tips information

description: Every applicant must submit the signed Release of Information Authorization Form.

source_reference.section: Return the following to MCO Housing Services
source_reference.quote: Complete, signed and dated Release of Information Authorization Form

description: Identification is required for each household member per checklist item 1.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 1
source_reference.quote: Identification for each household member, i.e. Birth Certificate etc.

description: Applicant indicated they have a Section 8 or other housing voucher on the checklist.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 2
source_reference.quote: If you have a Section 8 Voucher or other Housing Voucher, you MUST provide a valid copy with your application or a letter from your Public Housing Authority.

description: Sanity overlay: personal_information field indicates Section 8/housing voucher is true.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 2
source_reference.quote: If you have a Section 8 Voucher or other Housing Voucher, you MUST provide a valid copy with your application or a letter from your Public Housing Authority.

description: Applicant indicated local preference applies per checklist item 3.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 3
source_reference.quote: Proof of Local Preference, if applicable. i.e. lease, utility bill, voter registration, etc.

description: Applicant indicated a special accommodation is required per checklist item 4.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 4
source_reference.quote: If you require Special Accommodation you must request as part of your application and if documentation is required, i.e. doctors letter, it MUST be included with the application.

description: Sanity overlay: personal_information field indicates special accommodation is required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 4
source_reference.quote: If you require Special Accommodation you must request as part of your application and if documentation is required, i.e. doctors letter, it MUST be included with the application.

description: Applicant indicated pay stubs are applicable per checklist item 5.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 5
source_reference.quote: The most recent last five (5) consecutive pay stubs for all jobs (check/direct deposit stubs).

description: Sanity overlay: applicant has non-zero monthly base income, implying pay stubs are needed.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 5
source_reference.quote: The most recent last five (5) consecutive pay stubs for all jobs (check/direct deposit stubs).

description: Applicant has a date of hire on record; if hired within last 12 months an employment offer letter is required (over-fires on any non-null hire date per DSL recency limitations).

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 5 NOTE
source_reference.quote: If you have obtained a new job within the last 12 months you must provide a copy of the Employment Offer Letter.

description: Applicant indicated benefit letters are applicable per checklist item 6.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 6
source_reference.quote: Benefit letter providing full amount of periodic amounts received from Social Security, annuities, insurance policies, retirement funds, pensions, disability or death benefits and other similar types of periodic receipts.

description: Applicant indicated child support/alimony applies per checklist item 7.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 7
source_reference.quote: Child support and alimony: court document indicating the payment amount, DOR statement, copy of divorce papers. If you do not receive child support provide a letter stating that you are not receiving child support. See attached form.

description: Applicant indicated self-employment applies per checklist item 8.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 8
source_reference.quote: If you are self-employed you MUST provide a detailed expense and income statement for the last 12 months and three months of business checking and savings accounts along with last three Federal Income Tax Returns.

description: Applicant indicated 2024 federal tax returns apply per checklist item 9.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 9
source_reference.quote: Federal Tax Returns –2024 (NO STATE TAX RETURNS)

description: Applicant indicated IRS non-filing verification applies per checklist item 9 note.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 9 NOTE
source_reference.quote: If you have not filed tax returns you must provide a letter from the IRS Verifying Non-filing of your tax return(s).

description: Applicant indicated W2/1099-R applies per checklist item 10.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 10
source_reference.quote: W2 and/or 1099-R Forms: 2024 & (2025 if available)

description: Applicant indicated interest/dividend income applies per checklist item 11.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 11
source_reference.quote: Interest, dividends and other net income of any kind from real or personal property.

description: Applicant indicated checking account statements apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Checking
source_reference.quote: Checking accounts –EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Sanity overlay: checking account balance is non-zero, implying a statement is required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Checking
source_reference.quote: Checking accounts –EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Applicant indicated prepaid debit card statements apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Pre-paid debit
source_reference.quote: Pre-paid debit card statements EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Sanity overlay: debit_card asset balance is non-zero, implying a prepaid debit statement is required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Pre-paid debit
source_reference.quote: Pre-paid debit card statements EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Applicant indicated digital wallet statements apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Digital Wallets
source_reference.quote: Digital Wallets: Cash App, VENMO, Pay Pal, Apple Casg etc statements explaining all deposits.

description: Applicant indicated savings account statements apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Savings
source_reference.quote: Saving accounts – EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Sanity overlay: savings asset balance is non-zero, implying a savings statement is required.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Savings
source_reference.quote: Saving accounts – EVERY PAGE – FRONT AND BACK.

description: Applicant indicated revocable trusts apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Revocable Trusts
source_reference.quote: Revocable trusts

description: Sanity overlay: revocable_trusts asset balance is non-zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Revocable Trusts
source_reference.quote: Revocable trusts

description: Applicant indicated equity in rental property/capital investments applies per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Equity
source_reference.quote: Equity in rental property or other capital investments

description: Sanity overlay: equity_rental_or_capital_investments asset balance is non-zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Equity
source_reference.quote: Equity in rental property or other capital investments

description: Applicant indicated investment accounts apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Investment
source_reference.quote: Investment accounts, including stocks, bonds, Treasury Bills, Certificates of Deposit, Mutual Funds, Money Market, Robinhood and all online accounts, etc.

description: Sanity overlay: stocks_bonds_tbills_cd_mutual_funds asset balance is non-zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Investment
source_reference.quote: Investment accounts, including stocks, bonds, Treasury Bills, Certificates of Deposit, Mutual Funds, Money Market, Robinhood and all online accounts, etc.

description: Applicant indicated retirement accounts apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Retirement
source_reference.quote: Retirement accounts, IRA, Roth IRA, 401K, 403B, etc for all current and past jobs

description: Sanity overlay: ira_401k_keogh asset balance is non-zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Retirement
source_reference.quote: Retirement accounts, IRA, Roth IRA, 401K, 403B, etc for all current and past jobs

description: Applicant indicated cash value life insurance applies per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Life Insurance
source_reference.quote: Cash value of Whole Life or Universal Life Insurance Policy.

description: Sanity overlay: cash_value_life_insurance asset balance is non-zero.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Life Insurance
source_reference.quote: Cash value of Whole Life or Universal Life Insurance Policy.

description: Applicant indicated personal property investment applies per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Personal Property
source_reference.quote: Personal Property held as an investment

description: Applicant indicated lump sum/one-time receipts apply per checklist item 12.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 12 - Lump Sum
source_reference.quote: Lump-sum receipts or one-time receipts

description: Applicant indicated student status proof is needed per checklist item 13.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 13
source_reference.quote: Proof of student status for dependent household members over age of 18 and full-time or part-time students. Letter from High School or College providing student status, full time or part time for current or next semester.

description: Applicant indicated proof of pregnancy is applicable per checklist item 14.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 14
source_reference.quote: A household may count an unborn child as a household member. The household must submit proof of pregnancy with the application, i.e. letter from doctor.

description: Applicant indicated divorce or separation documentation applies per checklist item 15.

source_reference.section: Required Personal Identification and Income Verification Documents, Item 15
source_reference.quote: If the applicant is in the process of a divorce or separation, the applicant must provide legal documentation that the divorce or separation has begun or has been finalized.
